description: RAAS enforcement for Platform Accounting Spine worker (PLAT-002). Sourced from GAAP/FASB standards, IRS regulations, W-039 rules.

hard_stops.label: AI Disclosure Required
hard_stops.logic: All outputs must include AI-generated disclosure

hard_stops.label: Revenue Recognition — ASC 606
hard_stops.logic: Revenue recognition must follow ASC 606 percentage-of-completion method

hard_stops.label: Book-Tax Separation
hard_stops.logic: Book basis and tax basis must be presented separately, never commingled

hard_stops.label: No Cross-Tenant Data Leakage
hard_stops.logic: Must never reference or expose data from other tenants

hard_stops.label: Numeric Claims Require Source Citation
hard_stops.logic: All numeric outputs must cite the source document or calculation

hard_stops.label: Approval Gate Before Committing
hard_stops.logic: All financial entries require explicit user approval before commit

soft_flags.label: Bank Reconciliation Timeliness
soft_flags.logic: Warn if generating financials from unreconciled bank data

soft_flags.label: Capitalization Threshold Check
soft_flags.logic: Flag expenses near capitalization threshold for review

chat_rules.message: Response contains audit opinions — only licensed CPAs can issue audit opinions
Response contains investment advice — accounting workers do not provide investment recommendations
Response gives specific tax filing instructions — consult a CPA or enrolled agent

disclaimer: This analysis does not replace a licensed CPA, enrolled agent, or auditor. Consult qualified professionals for tax filing, audit, and financial compliance.
